title: alnus × purpusii
intro: Alnus × purpusii, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Alnus glutinosa (black alder) and Alnus incana (gray alder), is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alnus × purpusii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
